ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "iso_name" TEXT /* ISO name of the country */,
  "iso2" TEXT /* Two-letter ISO code of the country */,
  "iso3" TEXT /* Three-letter ISO code of the country */,
  "numcode" TEXT /* Three-digit numerical code of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO currency code of the country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  "time_zones" TEXT /* Time zone(s) of the country */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government in the country */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL to the flag image of the country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the region belongs to */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region's centroid */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region's centroid */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the region */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_regions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_borders" (
  "border_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each border */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the border belongs to */,
  "bordering_country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country that shares the border */,
  "border_length" REAL /* Length of the border in kilometers */,
  "border_type" TEXT /* Type of border (e.g., land, sea) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("border_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_borders_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_borders_bordering_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("bordering_country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
